mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_messages (user_id, order_id, message, status, sender_role, user_unread, admin_unread) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{message}, #{status}, #{senderRole}, #{userUnread}, #{adminUnread})
mapper.select: SELECT sm.*, u.username FROM service_messages sm JOIN users u ON u.id = sm.user_id ORDER BY sm.admin_unread DESC, sm.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_messages WHERE admin_unread = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_unread = TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE service_messages SET admin_unread = FALSE WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE service_messages SET admin_unread = FALSE WHERE admin_unread = TRUE
UPDATE service_messages SET user_unread = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE service_messages SET user_unread = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
